memoryArtifacts.headline: Olaf McTyre
memoryArtifacts.description:
Olaf mctyre
Olaf McTyre, Circa 1320 - Circa 1380
Olaf McTyre was born circa 1320, in birth place, to Tormod MacLeod.
Tormod was born circa 1270, in Scotland.
Olaf married Unknown.
They had one son: P …

zh.Kincardine, Ross, Scotland, United Kingd: 英國蘇格蘭洛-爾金加迪
zh.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre於1320年出生在蘇格蘭洛-爾。他和Lady MacIntyre至少有1個兒子。他去世於1380年在蘇格蘭享年60歲。

zh-hans.Kincardine, Ross, Scotland, United Kingd: 英国苏格兰洛-爾金加迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre于1320年出生在苏格兰洛-爾。他和Lady MacIntyre至少有1个儿子。他去世于1380年在苏格兰享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: MacIntyre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntyre
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an tSaoir ‘son of the craftsman’. Compare Irish McAteer .
History: This is the name of a Scottish clan which, according to clan lore, is descended from Maurice MacNeil, a nephew of Somhairle (English: Sorley or Somerled), King of the Isles (died 1164).

nameMeanings.name: Olaf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from an Old Norse personal name composed of the elements anu ‘ancestor’ + leifr ‘heir, descendant’. St Olaf , King of Norway ( 995–1030 ), aided the spread of Christianity in his kingdom. The name was introduced to Britain before the Norman Conquest, but modern use as a given name in the English-speaking world originated in America, where it was taken by recent Scandinavian immigrants.

en.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre was born in 1320, in Ross-shire, Scotland. He had at least 1 son with Lady MacIntyre. He died in 1380, in Scotland, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre est né en 1320, à Ross-shire, Écosse. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Lady MacIntyre. Il est décédé en 1380, à Écosse, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre wurde 1320 in Ross-shire, Scotland geboren. Er hatte mit Lady MacIntyre mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1380 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre è nato il nel 1320 nel Ross-shire, Scotland. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Lady MacIntyre. Morì nel 1380, nel Scotland, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Balnagowan House, Ross, Scotland: スコットランドロス-シュアイア
ja.Kincardine, Ross, Scotland, United Kingd: イギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアキンカーディン
ja.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyreは1320年にスコットランドロス-シュアイアで生まれた。彼はLady MacIntyreとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1380年にスコットランドで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre(은)는 1320년 스컷랜드 로스-실르에서 태어났다. 그는 Lady MacIntyre(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1380년 스컷랜드에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre nasceu em 1320, em Ross-shire, Scotland. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Lady MacIntyre. Ele faleceu em 1380, em Scotland, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre родился в 1320 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Lady MacIntyre. Он умер в 1380 г. в местности Шотландия в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: The Red Olaf MacIntyre nació en 1320, en Ross-shire, Scotland. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Lady MacIntyre. Murió en 1380, en Scotland, a la edad de 60 años.
